name: ScrollBreak
description: ScrollBreak is a mobile app that fights doomscrolling by monitoring scrolling behavior, showing real-time usage insights, and sending smart break reminders so users can build healthier digital habits.

name: CarbonCredible
description: An AI-driven solution to screen for feasible carbon projects. (This project is not eligible for awards)

name: ❤️ Health Connect
description: Telemedicine platform connecting patients with healthcare professionals.

name: 🌱 Smart Garden
description: IoT-powered gardening system that optimizes plant growth.

name: 🔐 Secure Vault
description: Next-generation password manager with biometric authentication.

name: 🚀 Space Explorer
description: Virtual reality educational platform for exploring the solar system.
